summary: dbt.com exposes two developer surfaces: the dbt Cloud REST APIs (v2/v3, base URL https://cloud.getdbt.com/) authenticated with either a personal access token or service account token in the `Authorization` header using `Token <token>` or `Bearer <token>`, and the Discovery API GraphQL endpoint (https://metadata.cloud.getdbt.com/graphql) authenticated with a service token in `Authorization` as `Token` or `Bearer`; dbt also documents an MCP server for local/remote use that connects via OAuth or tokens.
